mechanism_narrative: Rising 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue growth for index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional base rate over any 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses more than 0.3 percentage points above its 12-month low, labor-market deterioration signals rising recession risk and lower expected earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses >0.3pp above its trailing 12-month low
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations deliver positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS crossing to a new 12-month high tightens discount rates and reduces equity duration value, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 12-month maximum
failure_condition: Reject if new 12-month highs in FEDFUNDS are followed by nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year walk-forward test windows.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving real output and operating leverage, raising expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the rank correlation between INDPRO 3-month momentum and subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns is below 0.03 in any 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST crosses below its 6-month moving average while RSAFS also decelerates, weakening housing and consumption jointly signal demand softness, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses >8% below its 6-month moving average and RSAFS 3-month growth declines
failure_condition: Reject if joint housing-consumption triggers are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns less than 50% of the time in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS deceleration combined with a rising UNRATE indicates broad labor demand weakening, reducing income growth and earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average gain falls below its 12-month average and UNRATE rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have average 20-day S&P 500 returns at or above the unconditional average in any 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: CPIAUCSL acceleration during a rising FEDFUNDS path signals inflation pressure that forces tighter policy and compresses equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month growth exceeds 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-tightening triggers produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if downside hit rate is not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly growth in GDPC1 signals broad real demand expansion and supports aggregate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 quarterly growth is not associated with above-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of walk-forward observations.
